raw.message: Prodigy makes math fun and engaging for your kids. That's one New Year's resolution checked off your list. ✅

hook.summary: A 3D-rendered abacus and a toggle switch represent moving from old-fashioned math to modern fun.
hook.visual_action: A toggle switch with the brand logo flips from off to on above a traditional abacus.
hook.text_overlay: Hey parents! This new year, slide math out of the past

scene_flow: Intro shows an old-fashioned abacus and a toggle switch representing the 'old way' of math.
The switch flips to 'ON', transitioning the scene into a vibrant game world.
Gameplay footage displays a monster battle where math problems power attacks.
Closing screen features the brand logo, a mascot, and a call to action.
on_screen_text: This new year, slide math out of the past
and into fun mode with Prodigy.
audience_proxy: Parents of school-aged children seeking educational but entertaining math supplements.
